all_shots.narration: The Florida Everglades stretch across millions of acres of slow moving water and dense sawgrass.
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: It is one of the most specialized ecosystems on Earth.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=33.5 visual=Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction

all_shots.narration: But right now, a massive predator is moving just beneath the surface.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=42.5 visual=Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction

all_shots.narration: And it was never supposed to be here. In the 1980s, Miami established itself as the exotic pet capital of the United Sta
all_shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=26.0 visual=Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction

all_shots.narration: importing thousands of foreign reptiles through its ports every single year.
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: Consumers purchased baby Burmese pythons with no understanding of their explosive growth rate.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=36.0 visual=Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: Within months, these snakes reached lengths that made them impossible to keep.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=31.5 visual=Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: When the pythons outgrew their enclosures, overwhelmed owners drove to the nearest swamp and dumped them illegally into
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=32.0 visual=Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: seeding the wetlands with an apex predator.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=31.5 visual=Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: Then, in August of 1992, Hurricane Andrew, a Category 5 storm,
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: tore through South Florida and destroyed a commercial python breeding facility,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hurricane score=42.0 visual=August 1992 calendar beside hurricane map over Florida

all_shots.narration: releasing hundreds of snakes into the Everglades in a single catastrophic night.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hurricane score=38.0 visual=Hurricane Andrew 1992 and breeding facility breach

all_shots.narration: For years, researchers dismissed sightings as isolated incidents, but by the year 2000,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hurricane score=41.0 visual=Hurricane Andrew 1992 and breeding facility breach

all_shots.narration: scientists confirmed what they feared.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hurricane score=26.0 visual=August 1992 calendar beside hurricane map over Florida

all_shots.narration: The pythons had become a fully established, self-reproducing population in the wild.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=population score=7.3 visual=Established python population and management shift

all_shots.narration: These snakes have no natural predators in Florida.
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: A single female can lay up to 100 eggs per clutch.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=32.0 visual=Declining native mammal population chart or infographic

all_shots.narration: Their camouflage makes them nearly invisible,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=32.0 visual=Declining native mammal population chart or infographic

all_shots.narration: and they have systematically consumed the Everglades' native mammals into near extinction.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=ecosystem_collapse score=33.0 visual=Native mammal decline charts and local extinctions

all_shots.narration: Raccoon and opossum populations have collapsed by 99%.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=ecosystem_collapse score=33.5 visual=Native mammal decline charts and local extinctions

all_shots.narration: Marsh rabbits and foxes are now considered locally extinct across most python-invaded areas.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=36.5 visual=Python camouflage, reproduction, and advantages

all_shots.narration: The food web is being dismantled from the bottom up,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=ecosystem_collapse score=30.0 visual=Native mammal decline charts and local extinctions

all_shots.narration: but the pythons didn't stop at small mammals.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=29.0 visual=Python camouflage, reproduction, and advantages

all_shots.narration: They moved up the food chain, successfully hunting and consuming the region's own apex predator,
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: the American alligator, predator-eating predator.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=alligator score=27.5 visual=Python Challenge hunters and removal statistics graphic

all_shots.narration: In response, scientists launched the Scout Snake Program.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=alligator score=25.5 visual=Python Challenge hunters and removal statistics graphic

all_shots.narration: They capture male pythons, surgically implant radio transmitters beneath their scales,
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: and release them back into the wild. These tracked males then lead biologists directly to hidden breeding aggregations,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=scout_snake score=33.5 visual=Scout snake radio transmitter program

all_shots.narration: clusters of females that would otherwise remain completely undetectable in the dense swamp.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=scout_snake score=28.0 visual=Scout snake radio transmitter program

all_shots.narration: At night, wildlife officers wade into pitch-black swamp water
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=12.0 visual=Thermal cameras, canine units, and eDNA testing

all_shots.narration: armed with nothing but headlamps and snake hooks. Their mission?
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: Capture these massive pythons by hand one at a time.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=alligator score=19.0 visual=Python Challenge hunters and removal statistics graphic

all_shots.narration: A single, 16-foot python generates enough muscular force to overpower three grown men.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=alligator score=13.5 visual=Python Challenge hunters and removal statistics graphic

all_shots.narration: Every capture is a violent physical struggle
all_shots.match_reason: topic=alligator score=14.0 visual=Alligator predation, lungworm parasite, food web collap

all_shots.narration: against hundreds of pounds of raw constricting power.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=10.5 visual=Surgical radio transmitter implant on captured python

all_shots.narration: Florida has also mobilized civilian forces.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=11.0 visual=Florida Python Challenge and removal statistics

all_shots.narration: Every year, nearly a thousand hunters travel from across the globe
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: to compete in the Florida python challenge,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=30.5 visual=Florida Python Challenge and removal statistics

all_shots.narration: a 10-day event with $10,000 in prize money on the line.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=27.5 visual=Surgical radio transmitter implant on captured python

all_shots.narration: Between civilian events and state-funded contractors,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=27.5 visual=Florida Python Challenge and removal statistics

all_shots.narration: more than 23,000 pythons have been removed from Florida's public lands.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=27.5 visual=Thermal/infrared python detection on patrol vehicle

all_shots.narration: But statistical models suggest that number represents less than 1% of the actual population.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=-5.2 visual=Python vs alligator predation illustration

all_shots.narration: The state has pivoted to technology. Engineering teams have mounted 850 nanometer near infrared cameras
all_shots.match_reason: topic=population score=-6.9 visual=Camouflaged Burmese python hidden in leaf litter

all_shots.narration: to patrol vehicles, scanning for python heat signatures
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: that are completely invisible to the naked eye.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=33.5 visual=Thermal cameras, canine units, and eDNA testing

all_shots.narration: Biologists are testing the water itself, analyzing environmental DNA to confirm a python's recent presence
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=35.5 visual=Thermal cameras, canine units, and eDNA testing

all_shots.narration: in a specific area even weeks after the snake has moved on.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=32.0 visual=Thermal cameras, canine units, and eDNA testing

all_shots.narration: The invisible made detectable. But now genetic testing has revealed a new complication.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=33.5 visual=Thermal cameras, canine units, and eDNA testing

all_shots.narration: The Burmese pythons are actively hybridizing with the Indian rock python,
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: a smaller, faster species, creating offspring with increased genetic vigor
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hybrid score=33.0 visual=DNA helix and hybrid python genetics visualization

all_shots.narration: and adaptability. 2025 range data shows these hybrids pushing beyond South Florida's borders,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hybrid score=35.0 visual=Hybrid genetics and northward range expansion

all_shots.narration: advancing steadily into new counties to the north,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hybrid score=33.5 visual=Hybrid genetics and northward range expansion

all_shots.narration: with a warming climate removing cold barriers.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hybrid score=32.0 visual=Hybrid genetics and northward range expansion

all_shots.narration: Their expansion may be unstoppable.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=4.8 visual=DNA helix and hybrid python genetics visualization

all_shots.narration: Total eradication is no longer considered a realistic scientific goal.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=4.3 visual=DNA helix and hybrid python genetics visualization

all_shots.narration: The state has shifted its entire strategy to permanent damage control
all_shots.match_reason: topic=conclusion score=29.5 visual=Eradication impossible; Everglades under siege

all_shots.narration: and the protection of whatever native habitats still remain.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=conclusion score=28.0 visual=Eradication impossible; Everglades under siege

all_shots.narration: The Burmese python has proven how a single
all_shots.match_reason: topic=conclusion score=24.0 visual=Eradication impossible; Everglades under siege

all_shots.narration: unchecked invasive species can permanently
all_shots.match_reason: topic=technology score=-4.4 visual=Wide Everglades marshland with sawgrass and sky

all_shots.narration: and irreversibly alter a fragile ecosystem.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_challenge score=-5.2 visual=Florida Python Challenge and removal statistics

all_shots.narration: Florida is holding the line. But it remains to be seen if the Everglades can endure
all_shots.match_reason: topic=population score=-15.9 visual=Established python population and management shift

all_shots.narration: or if this landscape has already been surrendered to the Python.
